canonical_definition: A benchmark comprising 4,780 question-answer pairs designed to evaluate LLMs and RAG systems on cross-document, multi-entity question answering across comparative, statistical, and relational reasoning tasks.
papers: LLMBias Detection and Mitigation through the Lens of Desired Distributions
